ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host": Mule::p('http.requester.milesSAPI.host'), "port": Mule::p('http.requester.milesSAPI.port'), "basePath": Mule::p('http.requester.milesSAPI.basePath'), "method": Mule::p('http.requester.milesSAPI.creditCreditQuoteApplication.method'), "path": Mule::p('http.requester.milesSAPI.creditCreditQuoteApplication.path'), "protocol": Mule::p('http.requester.milesSAPI.protocol'), "timeout": Mule::p('http.requester.milesSAPI.creditCreditQuoteApplication.timeout'), "headers" :{ "x-country-code" : lower(attributes.properties.countryCode) default payload.countryCode, "x-correlation-id" : vars.correlationId, "x-client-id" : Mule::p('http.requester.clientId'), "x-client-secret" : Mule::p('secure::http.requester.clientSecret'), "Content-Type": "application/json", "Accept-Language": vars.localeCode }, "uriParams":{ applicationId: payload.entities[0].id, quoteId: payload.entities[0].subId } }

logger.doc:name: log miles sapi response
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "\'CountryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'QUOTEID\': " ++ vars.quoteId default '' ++ " \'Method\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.method default '' ++ " \'Resource\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.path default '' ++ " Miles Sapi End: " ++ now() ++ (if(p('log.payloadFlag') == 'true') ("\'Payload\': " ++ write(payload,"application/json")) else "")]

ee:transform.doc:name: Prepare Request Mapping and Dynamic HTTP operation params

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host": Mule::p('http.requester.archivingSAPI.host'), "port": Mule::p('http.requester.archivingSAPI.port'), "basePath": Mule::p('http.requester.archivingSAPI.basePath'), "method": Mule::p('http.requester.archivingSAPI.documentList.method'), "path": Mule::p('http.requester.archivingSAPI.documentList.path'), "protocol": Mule::p('http.requester.archivingSAPI.protocol'), "timeout": Mule::p('http.requester.archivingSAPI.documentList.timeout'), "headers" :{ "x-country-code" : lower(vars.countryCode), "x-correlation-id" : vars.correlationId, "x-client-id" : Mule::p('http.requester.clientId'), "x-client-secret" : Mule::p('secure::http.requester.clientSecret'), "Accept-Language": vars.localeCode } }

logger.doc:name: log archieve sapi response
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "\'CountryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'QUOTEID\': " ++ vars.quoteId default '' ++ " \'ApplicationId\': " ++ (vars.applicationId default "") ++ " \'Method\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.method default '' ++ " \'Resource\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.path default '' ++ " Archieve Sapi End: " ++ now() ++ (if(p('log.payloadFlag') == 'true') ("\'Payload\': " ++ write(payload,"application/json")) else "")]

ee:transform.doc:name: Prepare Request Mapping and Dynamic HTTP operation params

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "host": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.host'), "port": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.port'), "basePath": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.basePath'), "method": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.applications.method'), "path": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.applications.path'), "protocol": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.protocol'), "timeout": Mule::p('http.requester.salesforceAppMgmtSAPI.applications.timeout'), "headers" :{ "x-country-code" : lower(vars.countryCode), "x-correlation-id" : vars.correlationId, "x-client-id" : Mule::p('http.requester.clientId'), "x-client-secret" : Mule::p('secure::http.requester.clientSecret'), "Accept-Language": vars.localeCode } }

logger.doc:name: log sf sapi response
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "\'CountryCode\': " ++ vars.countryCode ++ " \'QUOTEID\': " ++ vars.quoteId default '' ++ " \'ApplicationId\': " ++ (vars.applicationId default "") ++ " \'Method\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.method default '' ++ " \'Resource\': " ++ vars.httpOperation.path default '' ++ " Salesforce applications mgmt Sapi End: " ++ now() ++ (if(p('log.payloadFlag') == 'true') ("\'Payload\': " ++ write(payload,"application/json")) else "")]

logger.doc:name: Log Response
logger.message: #[output application/java --- "Application is created Succesfully for" ++ "\'Transaction\': " ++ vars.correlationId default"" ++ " \'countryCode\': " ++ (vars.countryCode default"")++ " \'ApplicationId\': " ++ (vars.applicationId default "") ++ " \'QUOTEID\': " ++ vars.quoteId default '']
